Your pin code

We've generated a unique PIN code for your booking at Caber Park Tennis Courts. Simply type your code into the keypad at the entry gate to gain access.

04 May 2026

Gate Pin code

  • Court 1: 0782

Please note, after making your booking online, your pin code will take up to 30 minutes to activate. For refund requests for poor weather please email the booking office within 48 hours of the booking date and time at [email protected] All terms and conditions for use and regarding Covid-19 restrictions can be found here: www.cityofparramatta.nsw.gov.au/tennis

For times where court lighting is required, the lights will commence warming up once you enter your PIN at the main gate entrance. Lights can take 10 minutes to warm-up completely, so it is recommended that you arrive 10 minutes prior to your booking time. If someone is still on the court, you can still enter your pin while you wait for their booking to finish. Even if the lights are already on still enter your pin otherwise they will turn off.

Contact the organizer

Phone: 0298065140
Email: [email protected]
